# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MyServerlessEventProcessingQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # 24 hours in seconds
      VisibilityTimeout: 30          # Timeout period for processing messages (seconds)
      
  MySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: MyServerlessEventProcessingTopic
      TopicName: MyServerlessEventProcessingTopic
  
Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.QueueUrl
    
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref MySNSTopic
